name: signingTransact
title: Transact via Signing Service
description:
Execute a Convex transaction using a key stored in the peer's signing service. The private key never leaves the server. Looks up the account's on-chain public key and signs the transaction using the matching stored key.

Requires authentication via bearer token and a stored signing key matching the account's on-chain key.

source.description: Convex Lisp source code to execute, e.g. '(transfer #13 1000000000)'

address.description: Origin account address (e.g. '#13'). Must have a public key matching a stored signing key.

passphrase.description: Passphrase to decrypt the signing key

errorCode.description: CVM error code if the transaction failed

info.description: Execution metadata including juice used, fees, and transaction hash
